## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and operational updates.](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic traffic driving 52% of revenue (\~$750k/mo) for Vallarta site, offsetting recent paid media mismanagement](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [New content series planned: "3 reasons to visit \[destination\] in \[month\]", linking to tours](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Cancun site experiencing unexplained traffic drop since late May; investigation needed](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Interlinking strategy being refined to focus on tour pages and blog-to-tour links](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Record impressions and clicks for Cabo and Vallarta sites](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Cancun site showing concerning drop in traffic since late May](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [Key articles (e.g., Chichen Itza, hurricane season) stopped showing in analytics](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
      - [Pages still accessible; root cause unclear](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Action: Mariana to email Carlos (cc: Isabel, Saul) to investigate Cancun traffic drop](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)

### New Content Series Idea

  - ["3 reasons to visit \[destination\] in \[month\]" series proposed](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
      - [12 articles total (3 destinations x 4 months)](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [Focus on experiences, linking each reason to a relevant tour](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [Will complement existing "Top 20 things to do" series](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Isabel approved; to be added to content assignments](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [Instagram embedding issue resolved, improving article visuals](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Saul now has expanded IT capabilities for minor fixes](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Lucero returning from vacation on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Isabel to review pending Vallarta articles; Mariana to send prioritized list by keyword volume](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Next week's meeting time to be pushed back 1 hour due to conflict](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

### SEO Strategy

  - [New paid media agency starting this month](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Interlinking strategy being refined:](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
      - [Avoid linking from tour pages to blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
      - [Focus on tour-to-tour and blog-to-tour links](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
      - [Restricting interlinking within blog content](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

### Content Management Challenges

  - [Links breaking when copying from Google Docs to Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [Significantly increases publishing time (30 min to 1+ hour per article)](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Action: Mariana to record bug for developers; exploring HTML format as potential solution](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Isabel to review pending Vallarta articles, prioritizing by keyword volume](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Mariana to email Carlos about Cancun traffic drop, cc'ing Isabel and Saul](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Mariana to record Sanity CMS link-breaking bug for developer review](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Team to implement new "3 reasons to visit" content series](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Adjust next week's meeting time (1 hour later)](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Continue refining interlinking strategy, focusing on tour pages and blog-to-tour links](https://fathom.video/share/3dMUtMV6HxAr2FN4g6DuWu8nY1L_y_Ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
